resources.string: Would you like to cancel the current VPN Connection?
You are using Smarty VPN build v1.0.0, Enjoy unlimited bandwidth with stable connection and a lot of servers to choose from. No limits, No restrictions

Smarty VPN and Security unblock Proxy is world best supervpn app its Super Secure VPN Unlimited Proxy Server for lifetime free access. Unlock any websites save your device Secure VPN is the most trusted security, privacy and access platform with top performance on speed, stability and security to unblock sites, unblock any apps or websites, access social networks, watch videos and movies, protect Wi-Fi hotspot security and protect privacy

Keep all of your Internet activities
and your identity private.

Get rid of all the restrictions
and enjoy unblock everything.

Get access to bunch of VPN servers
and enjoy unlimited bandwidth.
I\'m using this Free VPN App, it\'s provide all servers free https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=

string-array.name: faq_questions
string-array.item: Why I need a VPN?
Is it safe?
How to use Smarty VPN?
How to disconnect Smarty VPN?
Can\’t connect, not stable or speed is slow.
How to switch server location?
Can\’t find the server you want?
Why can\'t I use Internet after connection established?
How to disable battery optimization for Smarty VPN?
How to cancel the subscription in Google play?
Can I get refund?

string-array.name: faq_answers
string-array.item: VPN is virtual private network. It allows you to stay private, stay secure, and access any online blocked content you want, no matter where you from.

We use SSL to encrypt your internet data. Your data is undecipherable to prying eyes while in route. Moreover, we do not collect, log, store, share any data log belonging to users, and please feel safe to use our product.
Click the \"Start\" button on the middle place of the home page. Then please “Trust this application” if your device asks for this permission.
Click the same connect button on the home page to disconnect from VPN server.

Connection problem is affected by many factors, please update to the latest version, refresh the server list and connect to the top server for few times. If it still does not work for you, please contact us via enoughraju@gmail.com and provide us with your country and network provider name.
Choose the location you want in the server list, then VPN will connect to the location you click.
Please contact and provide us the detail website address that you want to unblock via enoughraju@gmail.com We will collect your feedback and improve our product.
First of all, check your network connection. Then make sure you\'ve disable battery optimization for Smarty VPN in android\'s battery settings.

In most Android devices, Open Settings > Battery > Battery Optimization > Select all apps in drop down menu. Find Smarty VPN and set it "Don\'t optimize".In Huawei devices, Open Setting > Battery > Launch, Find Smarty VPN in the apps list,switch off to "Manage manually", enable "Auto Lunch" and "Run in background". Or you can find battery setting in "Protected Apps".In Samsung devices, Open settings > Battery > App Power Saving > Details, find Smarty VPN in the apps list and disable it.In other devices, you may find it in Setting > Battery > as "Background activity" or "Protected Apps"

Subscriptions on Google Play renew automatically unless you unsubscribe, if you want to unsubscribe, please open Google Play Store, tap Menu-Subscriptions-Tap thesubscription you want to cancel-Tap Cancel subscription. Check the details here: https://support.google.com/googleplay/answer/2476088
Not cancelling your subscription before the trial period ends will not be refunded. Check the details here: https://support.google.com/googleplay/answer/2476088

resources.string: How was your experience with us?
Suggest us what went wrong and we\'ll work on it.
All of these servers are being provided by the VPN gate project and they are offering their service free of charge. You can read more about the VPN gate project at https://www.vpngate.net/en/
